message:
fuzz(mvcc-compression): cover resolve_data_with chains incl. compressed

`ffs_mvcc::compression::resolve_data_with` walks back through a
chain of VersionData entries (Full / Identical / Zstd / Brotli) to
reconstitute the bytes for a requested index. The function is on the
read path of every MVCC version chain that was deduped or compressed,
yet had no fuzz coverage — meaning any panic, runaway loop, or
non-determinism on a malformed Zstd / Brotli payload or a malformed
Identical-only chain would slip past CI.

New target fuzz_mvcc_compression_resolve:
  - Builds chains of up to 16 entries from the input bytes.
  - Per entry, draws one of six kinds: Full, Identical, *adversarial*
    Zstd (likely malformed), adversarial Brotli, and *round-trip*
    Zstd / Brotli (encode → decode) so libFuzzer steers coverage
    through the success branches as well as the error branches.
  - Asserts: (1) determinism — repeating the resolve over the same
    chain returns identical results, (2) no panic for indices past
    the end of the chain, (3) Full entries always resolve to their
    inline bytes.
  - Caps total input at 2 KiB and per-entry payloads at 256 B so
    libFuzzer doesn't generate decompression bombs.

Ships with 15 hand-crafted seeds covering both happy paths
(round-trip Zstd/Brotli, Full bytes, single-element chain, mixed
Full→Zstd→Identical) and pathological shapes (adversarial Zstd
prefix only, invalid Zstd magic, random Brotli bytes, empty Brotli,
Identical at index 0, MAX_CHAIN-length all-Identical tail). Validated
by a 21-second libFuzzer run: 57 K executions, no crashes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,8 +10,10 @@ cargo-fuzz = true
 [dependencies]
 anyhow = "1.0.102"
 asupersync = "0.3.1"
+brotli = "8.0"
 crc32c = "0.6.8"
 libfuzzer-sys = "0.4"
+zstd = "0.13"
 
 [dependencies.ffs-block]
 path = "../crates/ffs-block"
@@ -271,3 +273,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_extent_cache_concurrent"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_extent_cache_concurrent.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_mvcc_compression_resolve"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_mvcc_compression_resolve.rs"
+doc = false
